title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

Okan Homepage

Announcements

2025 - 2026 English Preparatory Class (PACE) Exemption Exam

09
						September

2025

PACE (Preliminary Academic Course of English) resit exams will be held on

for the students who have failed their PACE courses. Students will only be allowed to take the resit exams for the courses that appear as

“K (Kaldı)”

on their transcripts.

Click to view OIS

Students who are required to take the Resit Exams or the OPAE (Okan Proficiency Academic Exam in English) will be enrolled in the

‘PACE-MAKE-UP’

course on

O’Learn

. All exam-related announcements will also be shared in this course. Students who are required to take the Resit Exams or the OPAE but cannot see this course on O’Learn must contact

pace.admin@okan.edu.tr

via email.

Students who have successfully completed all their PACE courses (check

https://www.okan.edu.tr/sayfa/5044/isleyis

)  with a passing grade (“G – Passed” on their transcript) will be eligible to take the

OPAE (Okan Proficiency Academic Exam in English)

, which will be held between

The list of students eligible to take the OPAE will also be announced in the

‘PACE-MAKE-UP’

course on O’Learn.
